prompts: Cinematic, Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, medium shot. Ari Mistfell, an androgynous crafter in a rolled-sleeve apron and ash-marked gloves, stands at a large wooden workbench cluttered with chaotic, scattered scout notes. Ari Mistfell carefully begins spreading the notes across the table, looking for patterns, then gestures for Ari Starling, a feminine healer in cream and mint robes, to assist in sorting them. Warm, cozy lamplight, high-quality anime art style, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous shot, Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall. Ari Starling, the feminine healer in cream and mint robes, steps closer to the workbench. She begins picking up the scattered notes, carefully organizing them into neat, categorized stacks alongside Ari Mistfell. They work in rhythmic, cooperative synchronization to clear the confusion. Soft, ambient lighting, consistent character appearance, no text, no watermark.
